upgrades.empty_msg: This is where you'll spend coins, diamonds, and other resources to power up your run. Upgrades are coming soon.
achievements.hover_hint: Hover over an achievement to see its details.
achievements.progress_pending: Not yet earned — meet the requirement above.
runes.effect.speed: Accel. Power +{{val}}%, Free Accel. +{{val2}}%, Global Speed +{{val3}}%
buildings.tax_prefix: Due to your excessive wealth, coin production is divided by
buildings.tax_cap: your tax also caps coin gain at
buildings.boost_warning: Buying resets your Prestige features (coins, accelerators, multipliers, upgrades, Diamonds) and your Diamond upgrades.
buildings.boost_safe: No longer resets your Prestige features (upgrade 46).
dialogs.confirm_prestige.title: Prestige?
dialogs.confirm_prestige.body: Reset your coin progress in exchange for diamonds.
dialogs.confirm_transcend.title: Transcend?
dialogs.confirm_transcend.body: Reset your coin and diamond progress in exchange for mythos.
dialogs.confirm_reincarnate.title: Reincarnate?
dialogs.confirm_reincarnate.body: Reset your coin, diamond, and mythos progress in exchange for particles.
dialogs.export_fallback.title: Copy your save (clipboard unavailable)
dialogs.import.title: Import save
dialogs.import.body: Paste an exported save string below.
dialogs.reset_state.title: Reset game state?
dialogs.reset_state.body: This permanently deletes your save and starts the game over. Your settings (theme, notation, buy amount) are kept. There is no undo.
dialogs.reset_settings.title: Reset settings?
dialogs.reset_settings.body: This restores theme, notation, buy amount, and confirmations to their defaults. Your save is untouched.
dialogs.reset_all.title: Reset everything?
dialogs.reset_all.body: This permanently deletes your save AND resets all settings to defaults. There is no undo.
dialogs.offline.title: Welcome back
toasts.import_bad: That save string could not be read
toasts.save_corrupt: Stored save could not be loaded — started fresh (old data preserved)
settings.saves.title: Saves
settings.saves.export_hint: Copies your save (and claims export rewards).
settings.saves.import_hint: Replace the current save with a pasted export.
settings.danger.title: Danger zone
settings.danger.reset_state_hint: Delete the save and start over. Settings are kept.
settings.danger.reset_settings_hint: Restore default theme, notation, buy amount, and confirmations. Save untouched.
settings.danger.reset_all_hint: Delete the save and reset all settings. Total fresh start.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.themes.title: Theme
upgrades.descriptions.1: Increase production of Workers per producer bought.
upgrades.descriptions.2: Increase production of Investments per producer bought.
upgrades.descriptions.3: Increase production of Printers per producer bought.
upgrades.descriptions.4: Increase production of Mints per producer bought.
upgrades.descriptions.5: Increase production of Alchemies per producer bought.
upgrades.descriptions.6: Increase all production based on producer bought.
upgrades.descriptions.7: Gain free multipliers based on your purchased Alchemies.
upgrades.descriptions.8: Gain 1 free Accelerator per 7 purchased Multipliers.
upgrades.descriptions.9: Gain 1 free Multiplier per 10 purchased Accelerators.
upgrades.descriptions.10: Improve Workers based on the first 750 purchased Investments.
upgrades.descriptions.11: Accelerators improve generation production by 2% each.
upgrades.descriptions.12: Each Prestige multiplies production by 1.01, multiplicatively (Max: 1e4x).
upgrades.descriptions.13: Augments buff the production of Investments.
upgrades.descriptions.14: Free Accelerators buff generation of Printers.
upgrades.descriptions.15: Free Accelerators buff generation of Mints.
upgrades.descriptions.18: Multiply Printer production based on Mythos Shards.
upgrades.descriptions.19: Multiply Investment production based on Mythos.
upgrades.descriptions.20: Coin upgrade 1 is raised to the eleventh power.
upgrades.descriptions.21: Gain 1 Multiplier and 5 Accelerators plus 1% more free Multipliers/Accelerators.
upgrades.descriptions.22: Gain 1 Multiplier and 4 Accelerators plus 1% more free Multipliers/Accelerators.
upgrades.descriptions.23: Gain 1 Multiplier and 3 Accelerators plus 1% more free Multipliers/Accelerators.
upgrades.descriptions.24: Gain 1 Multiplier and 2 Accelerators plus 1% more free Multipliers/Accelerators.
upgrades.descriptions.25: Gain 1 Multiplier and 1 Accelerators plus 1% more free Multipliers/Accelerators.
upgrades.descriptions.27: Gain free levels of Speed Rune based on unspent Coins. (Max: +100)
upgrades.descriptions.28: Gain a free level of Duplication Rune per 400 Coin producers bought. (Max: +100)
upgrades.descriptions.29: Gain a free level of Speed Rune per 400 Coin producers bought. (Max: +100)
upgrades.descriptions.30: Gain free levels of Duplication Rune based on unspent Coins. (Max: +100)
upgrades.descriptions.31: Gain 1 free Accelerator Boost per 2,000 Coin producers bought.
upgrades.descriptions.32: Gain free Accelerators based on Unspent Diamonds.
upgrades.descriptions.33: Gain 1 free Multiplier for each Accelerator Boost owned.
upgrades.descriptions.36: Multiply Crystal production by Diamonds, maximum 1e5000x.
upgrades.descriptions.37: Multiply Mythos Shard production by the squared logarithm of Diamonds.
upgrades.descriptions.38: Gain +20% more Offerings thanks to generous Discord Server Boosters!
upgrades.descriptions.39: Gain +60% more Ant Speed thanks to generous Discord Server Boosters!
upgrades.descriptions.40: Gain +25% more Ant Sacrifice rewards thanks to generous Discord Server Boosters!
upgrades.descriptions.41: Multiply production based on unspent Mythos.
upgrades.descriptions.42: Multiply Mythos Shard production based on unspent Diamonds.
upgrades.descriptions.43: Multiply coin production by 1.01 per Transcension (Max: 1e30x).
upgrades.descriptions.44: Multiply Mythos gain on Transcend by 1.01 per Transcension (Max: 1e6x).
upgrades.descriptions.45: Gain free Accelerators based on Mythos Shards.
upgrades.descriptions.46: Accelerator Boosts are 5% stronger and do not reset Prestige features.
upgrades.descriptions.47: Multiply Mythos Shard production based on your AP.
upgrades.descriptions.48: Multiply production based on owned Accelerators and Multipliers.
upgrades.descriptions.49: Gain free Multipliers based on unspent Mythos.
upgrades.descriptions.50: Gain +25% free Accelerators and Multipliers, but ONLY while doing Challenges.
upgrades.descriptions.51: Increase production of all Mythos buildings based on owned Accelerator Boosts.
upgrades.descriptions.53: Augments produce more Shards based on Acceleration Multiplier.
upgrades.descriptions.54: Wizards produce more Enchantments based on Multiplier.
upgrades.descriptions.55: Grandmasters produce more Oracles based on Building power.
upgrades.descriptions.59: Coin Mint production is multiplied by 1e+25000.
upgrades.descriptions.61: Welcome to Reincarnation! +7 Salvage to get you started.
upgrades.descriptions.62: Gain +0.02 Base Offerings per Challenge Completion! (Max: +12)
upgrades.descriptions.63: Crystal Production is multiplied based on Particles to the sixth power [Caps at 1e6000x].
upgrades.descriptions.64: Mythos Shard Production is multiplied by your Particles squared.
upgrades.descriptions.65: Multiply the gain of Particles from Reincarnation by 5x!
upgrades.descriptions.66: Add +2 to the Rune Coefficient of the first five Runes. Reduce how many offerings you need to level up your Runes!
upgrades.descriptions.67: Atom gain is increased by 3% per Particle producer purchased!
upgrades.descriptions.68: Gain a free Multiplier for every 1e1000x increase in tax.
upgrades.descriptions.69: Gain more Obtainium based on your particle gain. [Works with automation at a reduced rate!]
upgrades.descriptions.70: Time seems to go +0.333*log10(MAX Obtainium +1)% faster when you buy this.
upgrades.descriptions.71: Runes will gain (Rune Level/25) additional EXP per Offering used.
upgrades.descriptions.72: Obtainium gain from Reincarnations is multiplied (1 + 2C) where C is #Reincarnation Challenges completed, up to 50x!
upgrades.descriptions.73: Gain +100% free Accelerator Boosts and +10 free Crystal Upgrade levels, but only in Reincarnation Challenges.
upgrades.descriptions.74: Obtainium gain is increased based on highest ever unspent Offerings. [Max: 100,000 Offerings]
upgrades.descriptions.75: Offering gain is increased based on highest ever unspent Obtainium [Max: 30,000,000 Obtainium]
upgrades.descriptions.76: Ant generation kinda slow? I agree! Multiply Ant Speed by 5.
upgrades.descriptions.77: This is Synergism, right? Let's make each purchased Worker Ant multiply Ant Speed by 1.004.
upgrades.descriptions.78: Gain an Ant speed multiplier! x(1 + 0.005 * (log10(MAX Offerings + 1))^2) Ant Speed, to be precise.
upgrades.descriptions.79: The Ant Speed multiplier from your Global Speed multiplier is raised to the fourth power! If Global Speed multiplier is less than 1 this upgrade does nothing.
upgrades.descriptions.80: Gain Ant ELO based on your total Sacrifice Count! Up to +1,000 Ant ELO.
upgrades.descriptions.84: Automatically buy Coin Mints if affordable.
upgrades.descriptions.88: Automatically buy Accelerator Boosts if affordable. (For now, this does not work unless you also have the 6th Mythos upgrade purchased)
upgrades.descriptions.90: Automatically buy from the Generator Shop.
upgrades.descriptions.93: Generate 1% of Diamond Gain from prestiging per second.
upgrades.descriptions.99: Automatically buy Mythos Upgrades if affordable.
upgrades.descriptions.100: Generate 1% of Mythos Gain from transcending per second.
upgrades.descriptions.106: Refineries can produce Alchemies equal to Refineries owned raised to 0.10
upgrades.descriptions.107: Refinery -> Alchemy exponent increased from 0.10 to 0.25.
upgrades.descriptions.108: Refinery -> Alchemy exponent increased from 0.25 to 0.50
upgrades.descriptions.109: Refinery -> Alchemy exponent increased from 0.50 to 0.75
upgrades.descriptions.110: Refinery -> Alchemy exponent increased from 0.75 to 1
upgrades.descriptions.111: Augments can produce Pandora Boxes equal to Augments owned raised to 0.08
upgrades.descriptions.112: Augment -> Box exponent increased from 0.08 to 0.16
upgrades.descriptions.113: Augment -> Box exponent increased from 0.16 to 0.24
upgrades.descriptions.114: Augment -> Box exponent increased from 0.24 to 0.32
upgrades.descriptions.115: Augment -> Box exponent increased from 0.32 to 0.40
upgrades.descriptions.116: Protons can produce Grandmasters equal to Protons owned raised to 0.05
upgrades.descriptions.117: Protons -> Grandmaster exponent increased from 0.05 to 0.10
upgrades.descriptions.118: Protons -> Grandmaster exponent increased from 0.10 to 0.15
upgrades.descriptions.119: Protons -> Grandmaster exponent increased from 0.15 to 0.20
upgrades.descriptions.120: Protons -> Grandmaster exponent increased from 0.20 to 0.25
upgrades.descriptions.122: Increase Crystal Upgrade 3 cap by 100%! (Adds +100% to the max Diamond Building production bonus)
upgrades.descriptions.123: Raise coin production to the power of 1.025. More EXPONENTS.
upgrades.descriptions.124: Immortal ELO becomes Reborn ELO 1.1x as fast!
upgrades.descriptions.125: Constant Tax divisor is 0.333% stronger per challenge 10 completion. [Divisor^(1 + upgrade)]
upgrades.effects.7: Effect: Gain {{x}} free Multipliers from bought Alchemies.
upgrades.effects.16: Effect: Gain {{x}}x more Diamonds on Prestige
upgrades.effects.20: Effect: All coin production is further multiplied by {{x}} [Stacks with upgrade 1]!
upgrades.effects.37: Effect: All Mythos producers production x{{x}}
upgrades.effects.38: Effect: Thank you for getting the server above 30 boosts!
upgrades.effects.39: Effect: Thank you for getting the server above 30 boosts!
upgrades.effects.40: Effect: Thank you for getting the server above 30 boosts!
upgrades.effects.41: Effect: Welcome to Transcension! Coin production is multiplied by {{x}}.
upgrades.effects.42: Effect: All Mythos Shard producers are going into overdrive: x{{x}} the production!
upgrades.effects.43: Effect: Multiply all coin production by {{x}}!
upgrades.effects.44: Effect: Multiply Mythos gained in Transcension by {{x}}!
upgrades.effects.46: Effect: It's kinda self-evident, ain't it?
upgrades.effects.48: Effect: Multiply coin production by a factor of {{x}}!
upgrades.effects.50: Effect: It's quite obvious what the benefit is, but you must be in a Challenge for it to be in use!
upgrades.effects.52: Effect: Mythos-tier producers production x{{x}}! It's like inception, or something.
upgrades.effects.53: Effect: Augments will produce {{x}}x as many Mythos Shards.
upgrades.effects.54: Effect: Wizards will produce {{x}}x as many Enchantments; What productive spirits!
upgrades.effects.55: Effect: Grandmasters will produce {{x}}x as many Oracles!
upgrades.effects.56: Effect: It's quite obvious, ain't it?
upgrades.effects.64: Effect: All Mythos Shard production x{{x}}
upgrades.effects.65: Effect: 5x Particle gain from Reincarnations. Duh!
upgrades.effects.66: Effect: It's quite clear in the description!
upgrades.effects.67: Effect: The first particle-tier producer is {{x}}x as productive.
upgrades.effects.68: Effect: Your compliance with tax laws provides you with {{x}} free Multipliers, for some reason.
upgrades.effects.69: Effect: Cosmic Magnetics will allow you to gain {{x}}x as much Obtainium reincarnating x{{y}} automatic gain.
upgrades.effects.71: Effect: Writing's on the wall. Look above!
upgrades.effects.73: Effect: Same as Transcend upgrade 10, except you MUST be in a Reincarnation Challenge in particular.
upgrades.effects.81: Effect: All you need is right above this message.
upgrades.effects.120: Effect: All you need to know is right above this message!
upgrades.effects.122: Effect: +88% cap to Crystal Upgrade 3, duh!
upgrades.crystalUpgrades.1: Gain +1% Diamond Building production per level, for each Achievement Point!
upgrades.crystalUpgrades.2: Gain a boost to Crystals based on held coins per level.
upgrades.crystalUpgrades.3: Increase how much each purchased Diamond Building buffs Diamond Building production!
upgrades.crystalUpgrades.4: Add to the Exponent in the Crystal to Coin Multiplier formula!
upgrades.crystalUpgrades.5: Gain +5% Diamond Building production per level, per Transcension Challenge completed!
upgrades.crystalUpgrades.heading: Crystal Upgrades
stats.title: Status
detail.hint: Hover over anything to see its details here.
upgrades.hover_hint: Hover over an upgrade to see its effects.
settings.stats_panel.title: Status stats
settings.stats_panel.hint: Show reset gains and live production/system stats below the resource ledger (the resource list always shows).
settings.confirmations.title: Reset confirmations
settings.confirmations.hint: Ask for confirmation before each reset type. Turn one off to make that reset fire immediately.
upgrades.crystal_bonus: You have {{crystals}} Crystals, multiplying Coin production by {{mult}}×.
